description_public: A polygenic estimate related to natural sleep duration tendency variation in the general population.

AA.notes: This genotype has been associated with a tendency toward slightly longer usual sleep duration in some studies. The effect is small, and schedule, stress, and habits matter far more.

AG.notes: With one A and one G allele, your natural sleep duration tendency may fall between the two extremes, but real-life sleep patterns are mostly shaped by lifestyle, environment, and mental health.

GG.notes: This genotype has been associated with somewhat shorter habitual sleep duration on average. This does not mean you must sleep less; good sleep hygiene can strongly influence your actual sleep time.

evidence.title: Placeholder evidence for Natural sleep duration tendency
evidence.quote: This genotype has been associated with a tendency toward slightly longer usual sleep duration in some studies. The effect is small, and schedule, stress, and habits matter far more.
